---
name: onboard-developer
description: Get oriented with the Heroic Adventures Assistant project as a new developer.
argument-hint: your name or role (optional)
---

I'm new to this project. Walk me through:

1. The project structure and what each folder does.
2. How the MCP server works (edge functions, tool generation, knowledge folders).
3. How to run the server locally and test it.
4. How to add or modify knowledge content.
5. Where the developer skills and prompts live vs. the MCP-served content.

Use the project-architecture and update-mcp-server skills for reference. Keep it practical and action-oriented.
